meaning: n.(政党的)领导人秘密会议,核心小组会议vi.举行或参加政党领导层秘密的预备会议
examples: Our caucus meetings were always the highlight of my week.
If Kyl agrees, the majority of the caucus will follow suit.
But that is not what the conservative caucus-goers want to hear.
It is traditionally an orientation and a caucus organizing process on both sides of the aisle.
As a bipartisan interest group, the caucus has both Democrats and Republicans as members.
